name: HttpJsonTask

aliases.name: JsonArgs
aliases.comment: Args struct for jsonTask and its relatives.
aliases.type: { url : String.String, body : Http.Body, decoder : Json.Decode.Decoder a }

values.name: jsonResolver
values.comment: jsonResolver, similar to stringResolver or bytesResolver in elm/http.

values.name: jsonTask
values.comment: make a json task; specify the http method as a string.
values.type: String.String -> HttpJsonTask.JsonArgs a -> Task.Task Http.Error a

values.name: resolve
values.type: (body -> Result.Result String.String a) -> Http.Response body -> Result.Result Http.Error a
